summary: Purchase Orders Module Testing Complete. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend tests verified: Purchase Orders page loads correctly with list view, New Order form with all required fields (date, delivery date, order type, supplier select, line items), View dialog with status actions (Approve, Send, Receive, Post as Invoice), Post as Invoice dialog with debit/credit account selectors, mobile responsive card layouts for both list and form views. Filters (status, type) and search work correctly.

backend_api.POST /api/purchase-orders: Creates PO with auto-serial PO-YYYY-XXXXX format, status=draft
backend_api.GET /api/purchase-orders/{id}: Returns single PO with enriched data (created_by_name, purchase_invoice_number)
backend_api.POST /api/purchase-orders/{id}/post: Converts PO to Purchase Invoice with voucher, updates inventory
backend_api.DELETE /api/purchase-orders/{id}: Deletes non-posted POs (posted cannot be deleted)

frontend.sidebar_nav: Purchase Orders link present in sidebar with ClipboardList icon
frontend.list_view: Desktop table with columns: Order#, Date, Type, Supplier, Items, Total, Status, Invoice, Actions
frontend.mobile_list_view: Card layout for mobile (md:hidden) with all key info displayed
frontend.order_form: Fields: Date, Expected Delivery, Order Type (supplier/daily_sales), Supplier dropdown
frontend.line_items_desktop: Table with columns: #, Item, Barcode, Qty, Unit, Cost, Sell Price, Disc%, Total, Batch, Expiry
frontend.line_items_mobile: Card layout for mobile with same fields
frontend.low_stock_suggestions: Expandable section showing count of low stock items, click to add to order
frontend.notes_and_totals: Notes textarea, Subtotal, Discount%, VAT%, Total calculations
frontend.view_dialog: data-testid='po-view-dialog' shows PO details, status badge, line items table
frontend.status_actions: Approve, Mark Sent, Mark Received buttons based on current status
frontend.search: data-testid='search-orders-input' filters by order number, supplier name, notes

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All Purchase Orders features working correctly

seed_data_creation: Test POs created during backend tests: some with status posted (linked to PUR-2026-00001 invoice), some approved for workflow testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Purchase Orders module fully tested. Backend handles complete workflow: draft→approved→sent→received→posted. Post creates purchase_invoices and vouchers documents, updates inventory. Frontend page has desktop table + mobile cards. View dialog shows details with status-appropriate action buttons. All data-testids working correctly. Low stock suggestions feature pulls items where on_hand_qty < reorder_level.
